title: Mellstro's Echo
description: cool funny resource pack for real pro! replacing sounds with Mellstroy phrases
body:
# Mellstro's Echo
replacing sounds with Mellstroy phrases.

the advantages of this resource pack are 1+ skill, 2+ motivation, 3+ it's funny, 4+ everyone might reject you.


this is a roflo resource pack, but I don't plan to develop it after the release😎.


скачай и будь крутым чуваков ряльно ам ам ам СЛИвыы
..........................
